message:
chore: commit concurrent agent work + fix collapsible-if in lua_eval

Includes work from MistyBasin:
- Lua unpack/table.insert/remove/concat arg validation hardening
- command_keys() for optimized blocking key tracking
- ready_keys mechanism for efficient blocked client wakeup
- BlockingOp::keys() method for key extraction

Fix: collapse nested if in LuaTable::hash_get (clippy)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
